---
title: "‘A.J. Mundella as Vice-President of the Council, and the Schools Question, 1880-1885’"
---

## ‘A.J. Mundella as Vice-President of the Council, and the Schools Question, 1880-1885’

**Author:** W. H. G. Armytage
**Imprint:** <i>English Historical Review</i> 63 (January 1948) 52-82.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
